plugin_desc: Nateks Megatrans and Orion access-device SNMP child template for devices under enterprise PEN 4249. Beyond the shared Access SNMP floor for MIB-II uptime and IF-MIB 64-bit HC interface traffic, it collects confirmed private temperature-sensor values and local power-source status. CPU, memory, fan, SFP DDM, digital I/O, alarm and TLM tables are not promoted into shared device-health metrics.
name: Access

metrics.name: device_temperature_celsius
metrics.description: Board or chassis temperature from NATEKS-MIB temperatureSensorValue, normalized from 1/1000 degrees Celsius.

metrics.name: device_psu_state
metrics.description: Local power source availability from NATEKS-MIB powerSourceStatus, normalized so available(1) is healthy and all other values are abnormal.
